Problem, agitation, solution

Every new export should work without adding a dedicated patch for class names, image names or one-off CSS selectors from the old baseline file.

"Our team could compare snapshots instead of guessing what broke."

"The report finally tells us if CSS, assets or viewport mismatches caused the failure."

Does this support exported sites?

Yes. Relative assets, scripts, sections and fallbacks are analyzed before export.

Does it explain failures?

The report records renderer state, asset loading and fallback causes per file.
